body: tracker.py _would_introduce_cycle() calls self.load_issue(current) in a DFS loop to traverse dependency chains. If a dep ID referenced in an issue's deps list points to a non-existent issue file (e.g. deleted or corrupted), load_issue raises SystemExit which aborts the command with a confusing error. Should catch the missing-issue case and either treat it as a leaf (no further deps to traverse) or surface a clear warning.
title: cycle detection in _would_introduce_cycle crashes if referenced dep does not exist
